name: Grant Avenue Chews
recipeIngredient: 1 cup C and H Golden Brown Sugar (firmly packed)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together sugar and eggs.
2. Add flour, baking powder, and salt. Mix well.
3. Fold in dates and nuts.
4. Pour mixture into a greased 9-inch square pan.
5. Bake at 350 degrees for 30 minutes.
6. Cool for 10 minutes.
7. Cut into 24 squares.
8. Roll in powdered sugar.
